description: A screenshot of a social-media post from an account labeled 'Donald J. Trump' with the handle '@realDonaldTrump' and a profile picture showing a face overlaid with a U.S. flag pattern. The black-on-white text praises a Chief of Staff named Susie Wiles, states she has been diagnosed with early stage breast cancer and will continue working during treatment, and offers supportive remarks, signed 'President DONALD J. TRUMP'.
notable_text: Donald J. Trump; @realDonaldTrump; Susie Wiles is an incredible Chief of Staff
